infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: LifeAR uses your camera to display AR first aid guides on the patient.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: LifeAR uses microphone for emergency audio guidance.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: LifeAR needs access to your photos to set a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: LifeAR needs access to save profile pictures.
